citizen_actions.target: DHS Office of Inspector General + UN High Commissioner for Refugees
citizen_actions.template: Under the Freedom of Information Act (5 USC §552), I request all records relating to concentration camp operation including: enforcement actions taken, complaints received, investigations opened, prosecutions declined, and budget allocated. I request fee waiver as this request serves the public interest.

Write to your Representative and both Senators. Request: (1) oversight hearing on concentration camp operation, (2) GAO audit of enforcement, (3) mandatory reporting on prosecution rates, (4) budget allocation for enforcement. Reference: spectrometer score ELEVATED, 511,222 annual victims, $26.1B annual cost, P(prosecution)=7.2%.

Send the spectrometer data for concentration camp operation to: ProPublica, The Intercept, Reuters Investigates, AP, local newspaper. Include: 511,222 victims/yr, $26.1B cost/yr, $2.6B perpetrator profit/yr, P(prosecution)=7.2%, 0 enforcement actions. Frame: "The government has a spectrometer for this crime. The spectrometer shows X. The government did nothing."

citizen_actions.target: ICC Office of the Prosecutor + UN Human Rights Council + relevant UN Special Rapporteur
citizen_actions.template: Submit communication to ICC Office of the Prosecutor under Rome Statute Article 15. concentration camp operation constitutes a crime within the jurisdiction of the Court. Spectrometer evidence attached. 511,222 victims. P(domestic prosecution)=7.2% — domestic remedies are exhausted by structural impunity.
citizen_actions.authority: Rome Statute Art. 15 + UN Charter Art. 13
